film.title: Saturday Night Fever
film.overview: Tony spends his Saturdays at a disco where his stylish moves raise his popularity among the patrons. But his life outside the disco is not easy and things change when he gets attracted to Stephanie.

dialogues.dialogue: What did Mom say? What did she say about it?  She said, <<Dear Lord, what am I gonna tell Theresa and Marie?>>  - And Dad? What did he say about it? - They're ashamed, the both of them.  They're ashamed, right?  You ashamed of me, Tony?

She said, <<Dear Lord, what am I gonna tell Theresa and Marie?>>  - And Dad? What did he say about it? - They're ashamed, the both of them.  They're ashamed, right?  You ashamed of me, Tony?  Yeah, you are.
- And Dad? What did he say about it? - They're ashamed, the both of them.  They're ashamed, right?  You ashamed of me, Tony?  Yeah, you are.  - They didn't ask why or nothing? - No.
Mine's so big, I gotta strap it to my leg.  Anita says I got the biggest thing in town.  Proud of yourself now?  Is that what you wanted? Good.  Now you're a c**t.
dialogues.cause_raw: having the biggest thing in town
